ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the metric was recorded */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of operation performed */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of operations performed */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of operations */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency for operations */,
  "p50_latency" REAL /* 50th percentile latency for operations */,
  "p95_latency" REAL /* 95th percentile latency for operations */,
  "p99_latency" REAL /* 99th percentile latency for operations */,
  "pMax_latency" REAL /* Maximum latency for operations */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors for the given operations */,
  "service_instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific service instance where the metric was recorded */,
  "is_realtime" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the metric is real-time or historical */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the operation was initiated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES operation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud service region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the region */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the operation type */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the operation on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "service_plan" TEXT /* Service plan subscribed by the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "support_plan" TEXT /* Level of support plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service instance */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer using the instance */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the instance is located */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the service instance */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the instance was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service instance */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the instance was updated */,
  "resource_allocation" TEXT /* Resource allocation details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_instances_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_instances_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold that was exceeded */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance issue */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User or system that resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to resolve the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric associated with the threshold */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold for triggering an alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert triggered by the threshold */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the threshold must be exceeded to trigger an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical metric entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the time of recording */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the metric was recorded */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the metric */,
  "is_realtime" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the metric is real-time or historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic entry */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service instance */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage statistic */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the instance */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the instance */,
  "storage_usage" REAL /* Storage usage of the instance */,
  "network_in" REAL /* Incoming network traffic */,
  "network_out" REAL /* Outgoing network traffic */,
  "disk_read_iops" INTEGER /* Disk read IOPS */,
  "disk_write_iops" INTEGER /* Disk write IOPS */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the usage statistics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES service_instances ("instance_id")
)
